title: Luffy Takes on Mohji and Richie
description: On pages 17–18, Luffy confronts Mohji and Richie after their intimidation exposes the cruelty of Buggy’s pirates.
scene: Mohji and Richie try to use fear and force, but Luffy’s reaction turns the scene into a direct challenge against their bullying.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: THAT'S ALL I COULD SAVE FOR YOU, BOY!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: THE REST GOT EATEN, OR BURNED...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You did good! You fought well!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: I DIDN'T GET TO SEE YOU IN ACTION...

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: But I know you did good!

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: Teatime's over, kiddies! We're going to light up this town!! Until there's nothing left!!!

summary: This part pushes Luffy from casual involvement into righteous anger, especially when innocent people and loyal companions are hurt.
